definitions.text: A portion; a component. A fraction of a whole.
examples: Gaul is divided into three parts.
I was in Australia part of last year.
Gaul is divided into three parts.
I was in Australia part of last year.

definitions.text: A distinct element of something larger.
examples: The parts of a chainsaw include the chain, engine, and handle.

definitions.text: To leave the company of (each other, or someone/something .mw-parser-output .object-usage-tag{font-style:italic}.mw-parser-output .deprecated{color:var(--wikt-palette-grey-lime-8,olivedrab)}[with with or from]).
To cut hair with a parting.

examples: Fred was part owner of the car.

definitions.text: (with reference to a person's ethnicity) to a partial degree.
examples: My Native American friend is also part German and part French.
